tooClose.title: Can't place there
tooClose.message: Ships can't touch — try another spot.

outOfBounds.title: Can't place there
outOfBounds.message: That placement goes off the board.

needAllShips.title: Not ready yet
needAllShips.message: Place all your ships before marking ready.

hit.title: Direct hit!
hit.message: You hit a ship. Fire again!

notYours.title: Not your turn
notYours.message: Wait for your opponent to take their shot.

invalidId.title: Invalid Game ID
invalidId.message: Check the ID and try again.

notFound.title: Session not found
notFound.message: This game session no longer exists.
